# Session 5 notes

descended into the mines. goblin ambush on level one — landed it. party won, took 2 captives.

one captive talked. mentioned "the broken flame" cult, said they're running things below.

found a captive miner in a side cell. freed him. his name is Doric. says he's been down there for weeks. wants to get back to phandalin. asked party to deliver word to his sister there.

party agreed.

went deeper. level two had a cult symbol painted on a wall — three rings around a flame. nobody recognized it.

ran into a patrol. fight. won. one cultist surrendered, gave up that the leader is "the Mouth" somewhere on level three.

ended session at the level-three stairway.

next time: confront the Mouth, maybe.

[notes: marra didn't come up. orin didn't come up. didn't make it back to phandalin.]
